title: Volta Redonda, RJ — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Volta Redonda, RJ: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Volta Redonda is a city in RJ with a population of 274,925. An industrial city in the Paraíba Valley, home to Brazil’s largest steel mill (CSN) and a major manufacturing center.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
